childhood.familyBackground: Son of Kim Jin-man (김진만), seven-term National Assemblyman who served as Vice-Speaker of the National Assembly. Not born into wealth; self-made entrepreneur from political family background.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 국회부의장을 지낸 7선 국회의원 김진만의 아들. 정치인 집안에서 태어났으나 자수성가한 기업가.
childhood.education: High school education; began business career at age 24 without extensive formal higher education
childhood.educationKo: 고등학교 졸업; 24세의 젊은 나이에 창업하여 형식적 고등교육 없이 사업 시작
childhood.earlyLife: Born December 4, 1944, Kim Jun-ki came from a political family but chose entrepreneurship. He displayed extraordinary business acumen from youth, founding his first construction company at just 24 years old. His early ventures in Middle Eastern construction projects catapulted him to prominence during Korea's economic boom period.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1944년 12월 4일 출생한 김준기는 정치인 집안에서 태어났지만 기업가의 길을 선택했습니다. 24세의 젊은 나이에 미륭건설을 창립하여 뛰어난 경영 감각을 보였으며, 중동 건설 사업의 성공으로 한국의 경제 호황 시대에 두각을 나타냈습니다.
childhood.source: Wikipedia, Namu Wiki, DB Group official records, Monthly Joongang

careerTimeline.event: Age 24: Founded Mileung Construction Company (미륭건설), beginning his entrepreneurial journey
careerTimeline.eventKo: 나이 24세: 미륭건설 창립, 기업가로서의 여정 시작

careerTimeline.event: Founded Dongbu Express (동부고속) as second major business venture
careerTimeline.eventKo: 동부고속 창립, 두 번째 주요 사업 진출

careerTimeline.event: Entered Middle Eastern construction market as one of first Korean companies, beginning Jubail era
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한국 선발 기업으로 중동 건설시장 진출, 주베일 신화의 시작

careerTimeline.event: Secured major Jubail naval base construction contract (45 million USD); catapulted to top 10 Korean contractors
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주베일 해군기지 건설공사 수주(4,500만 달러); 국내 도급순위 10위권 진입

careerTimeline.event: Over five years in Middle East (1973-1980), successfully completed 2 billion USD in major construction projects
careerTimeline.eventKo: 중동 진출 5년간(1973-1980) 총 20억 달러의 대형 공사 성공적 수행

careerTimeline.event: Withdrew from Middle Eastern market after successful completion of major projects; began domestic group diversification
careerTimeline.eventKo: 중동에서 철수; 국내 그룹 다각화 본격 추진

careerTimeline.event: Launched diversification into four major national strategic industries: metals, chemicals, construction, logistics, and finance
careerTimeline.eventKo: 금속, 화학, 건설, 물류, 금융 등 4대 국가 기간산업 중심의 사업복합화 추진

careerTimeline.event: DB Group (formerly Dongbu Group) established as major Korean conglomerate, ranking in top 10
careerTimeline.eventKo: DB그룹(구 동부그룹) 재계 10위권의 거대 재벌로 성장

careerTimeline.event: Remained longest-serving founder-CEO among Korean chaebols; continued strategic management
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한국 재벌 중 최장수 창업주 경영인으로서 전략적 경영 지속

careerTimeline.event: Ranked #29 among Korean billionaires according to Forbes

failures.description: Asset decline and group restructuring: DB Group assets declined by 6.3 trillion KRW, dropping from top 10 to lower rankings
failures.descriptionKo: 자산 규모 감소: 그룹 자산이 6조 3천억 원 감소하여 재계 순위 10위권에서 탈락
failures.lesson: Demonstrates challenges of maintaining competitiveness during economic downturns and the difficulty of managing large, diversified conglomerates over long periods
failures.lessonKo: 장기적 경기 침체와 다각화된 거대 재벌 경영의 어려움을 보여줌

failures.description: Succession controversy: Attempted to pass leadership to eldest son but eventually placed close associate in chairman position instead
failures.descriptionKo: 승계 논란: 장남에게 경영진을 넘기려 하였으나 결국 친한 측근을 회장으로 선임
failures.lesson: Shows complexities of chaebol succession and family business governance; illustrates tension between family succession and meritocratic leadership
failures.lessonKo: 재벌 승계의 복잡성과 가족 기업 지배구조의 과제를 보여줌

quotes.text: I did not inherit a ready-made business. I built DB Group from scratch through my determination and vision.
quotes.textKo: 기성 기업을 물려받지 않았다. 내 결단과 비전으로 DB그룹을 완성했다.
quotes.context: Reflecting on his self-made entrepreneur journey from age 24
quotes.contextKo: 24세부터 시작한 자수성가 기업가로서의 여정에 대한 회고

personalTraits.knownFor: Self-made entrepreneur; longest-serving founder-CEO in Korean chaebol history; pioneering spirit in Middle Eastern construction market; visionary business diversification strategy; 'stubbornness and determination' (뚝심의 승부사)
personalTraits.knownForKo: 자수성가한 기업가; 한국 재벌 중 최장수 창업주; 중동 건설시장 선구적 개척; 사업 다각화 전략 비전; '뚝심의 승부사'로 알려짐
personalTraits.philanthropy: DB Group's corporate social responsibility initiatives and community investment
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: DB그룹 기업사회책임 활동 및 지역사회 투자
personalTraits.controversies: Later-life succession controversies and family business governance disputes regarding leadership transition
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 만년의 승계 논란 및 가족 기업 지배구조 분쟁
